description: These ethnic look slip-ons from catwalk are perfect for everyday wear and versatile enough to be worn with everything: from casual jeans and tees to skirts and dresses though they gel perfectly with ethnic wear.UpperT-strap on the forefoot Wide strap covering the ankles and the midfoot covered with heavy embellishmentsBeaded embellishment on the midfoot strap for extra styleSoft feel lining for extra comfortFootbed in ergonomic design with ethnic pattern for extra comfort and added styleOutsoleTPU outsole with heelTextured design on the forefoot and flower shaped heel for added comfortshoe careWipe surface with soft, clean cloth to remove dustDo not machine wash or use a drierDo not store in direct sunlight
